sentence: Your bron can smell vagynyamaxxing before you finish the handshake.

wombos.definition: A person who occupies the space between a bro and a son — someone younger who you treat like a bro, or a bro who carries son-coded energy.
wombos.example: He's not quite my bro and not quite my son — he's my bron.

wombos.definition: Maximally combining vanity, edge, cornball energy, and beta posturing into a single insufferable presentation. A vagynya maxxer is its practitioner.
wombos.example: I thought he was quiche but now all I see is vagynyamaxxing.
